quick_skim.title: Suppressing Spontaneous Droplet Shrinkage in Cahn-Hilliard-Stokes Microflows
quick_skim.abstract: This paper addresses non-physical artifact, specifically spontaneous droplet shrinkage, in Cahn-Hilliard-based simulations of immiscible two-phase microflows. That artifact arise from the energy functional's preference for reduced interfacial area, leading to shifts in equilibrium phase fractions away from the physical bounds of 0 and 1. A curvature-dependent correction is proposed that shifts the double-well potential to counteract this drift. This method is validated on the following test cases: an isolated droplet in a cubic cavity, drainage in a synthetic porous medium, and flow through a T-shaped junction. Results demonstrate significant suppression of phase fraction overshoot/undershoot and improved droplet volume conservation.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: improves Cahn-Hilliard phase-field method for two-phase flow simulations by correcting spontaneous droplet shrinkage
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 改进Cahn-Hilliard相场法模拟两相流，修正自发液滴收缩
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 改进Cahn-Hilliard相场法模拟两相流，修正自发液滴收缩
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 改进Cahn-Hilliard相场法模拟两相流，修正自发液滴收缩
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a curvature-dependent correction to the Cahn-Hilliard double-well potential to suppress artificial droplet shrinkage in two-phase microflow simulations; validated on droplet, drainage, and T-junction cases, improving volume conservation.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对Cahn-Hilliard相场方法在模拟两相微流中出现的非物理自发液滴收缩问题，提出一种基于曲率依赖的双势阱偏移修正策略。通过立方腔体内液滴、多孔介质排水和T型接头等三类测试案例验证，新方法可有效抑制相分数过冲/欠冲，保持液滴体积守恒，显著改善界面动力学行为。该修正为提高相场法多相流CFD模拟的物理一致性和数值稳定性提供了重要支持。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对Cahn-Hilliard相场方法在模拟两相微流中出现的非物理自发液滴收缩问题，提出一种基于曲率依赖的双势阱偏移修正策略。通过立方腔体内液滴、多孔介质排水和T型接头等三类测试案例验证，新方法可有效抑制相分数过冲/欠冲，保持液滴体积守恒，显著改善界面动力学行为。该修正为提高相场法多相流CFD模拟的物理一致性和数值稳定性提供了重要支持。
